forecast-period.text: Cloudy. Very high chance of rain. The chance of a thunderstorm. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon and evening. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h tending northwesterly in the morning then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 21.
Sun protection 11:10am to 1:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the evening. Light winds becoming west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 19.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 19.
Cloudy. Very high chance of rain. The chance of a thunderstorm. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the early morning. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon and evening. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h turning west to northwesterly in the late morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Sun protection 11:20am to 1:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the early afternoon then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the evening. Light winds becoming westerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h turning southwesterly during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Cloudy. Very high chance of rain. The chance of a thunderstorm. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning and afternoon. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h tending west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Sun protection 12:30pm to 1:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. High chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then tending westerly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h turning southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Cloudy. High chance of showers near the coast, slight chance elsewhere. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h.

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon and evening. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northerly 20 to 30 km/h in the late morning then decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the early afternoon then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the evening. Light winds becoming westerly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then tending northwesterly during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending west to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northerly in the late evening.

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm near the coast in the afternoon. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. High chance of showers, most likely in the evening. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending west to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the west, slight chance elsewhere. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the late evening.

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain, most likely in the morning. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon and evening. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 21.
Sun protection 11:10am to 1:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h turning southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming west to southwesterly and light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Cloudy. High chance of showers in the west, slight chance elsewhere. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h.

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon and evening. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 21.
Sun protection 11:30am to 12:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h tending southwesterly during the day then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Cloudy. Very high chance of rain. The chance of a thunderstorm. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the early morning. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon and evening. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h tending northwesterly in the middle of the day then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 22.
Sun protection 11:10am to 1:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the early afternoon then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 21.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 20.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers in the west, medium chance elsewhere. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 19.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the evening then becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening.

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain, most likely in the morning. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon and evening, possibly severe with damaging winds, large hail and heavy rain which may lead to flash flooding west of the ranges. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 22.
Sun protection 10:50am to 1:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. The chance of morning fog. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon and evening. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late afternoon then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 21.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog west of the ranges. Slight chance of a shower south of Hawker, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 20.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of rain east of Ceduna, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm, possibly severe with heavy rain which may lead to flash flooding east of Ceduna in the late afternoon and evening. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning and afternoon. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light before dawn then becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Sun protection 11:10am to 1:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers east of Ceduna, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 22.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h tending southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 22.
Cloudy. Very high chance of rain. The chance of a thunderstorm, possibly severe with heavy rain which may lead to flash flooding in the late afternoon and evening. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers. A thunderstorm likely in the afternoon and evening, possibly severe with damaging winds, large hail and heavy rain which may lead to flash flooding. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h tending northwesterly in the middle of the day then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Sun protection 11:10am to 1:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 21.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. The chance of morning fog in the south. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h tending southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Cloudy. Very high chance of rain. The chance of a thunderstorm. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon and evening. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning westerly in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Sun protection 11:30am to 1:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Light winds becoming westerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. The chance of morning fog. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h tending southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers south of Woomera, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm, possibly severe with heavy rain which may lead to flash flooding south of Woomera in the late afternoon and evening. Winds northwest to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers east of Coober Pedy, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm, possibly severe with damaging winds, large hail and heavy rain which may lead to flash flooding east of Coober Pedy in the afternoon and evening. Winds northwest to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending northwest to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then tending southeast to southwesterly in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Sun protection 10:30am to 2:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Coober Pedy. Medium chance of showers north of Marla, slight chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm in the late afternoon and evening. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light before dawn then becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Coober Pedy. Slight chance of a shower north of Marla in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day then tending south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Coober Pedy. Slight chance of a shower south of Woomera, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming southeast to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers about the Gammon Ranges, slight chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the evening.

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm, possibly severe with damaging winds, large hail and heavy rain which may lead to flash flooding west of Leigh Creek in the afternoon and evening. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending north to northeasterly in the morning then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 13 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 26.
Sun protection 10:20am to 2:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers in the far northeast, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 22.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Leigh Creek. Medium chance of showers in the far northeast, slight chance elsewhere. Winds southerly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 23.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower south of Yunta, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southerly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 23.
